entry.title: C_THR81_2511 – Exam Passed but Attempt Still Active / Cannot Restart Exam
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I would like to ask if anyone has experienced a similar issue with the C_THR81_2511 Employee Central certification.

I completed the scenario-based assessment and after submission the system displayed a final score of 80%, which means I officially passed the exam. However, immediately after submitting, the page turned completely white and no confirmation page was shown.

After the session time expired, the system suddenly displayed a message indicating that I had failed, which contradicts the previously shown passing score.

In the meantime, the certification is available again and my attempt has been recredited. However, the main issue now is that the system still considers my original exam attempt as active/ongoing, and I am therefore unable to start a new attempt.

So currently:

  • The system showed 80% (pass)

  • Then showed a fail message

  • My attempt was recredited

  • But the original attempt is still marked as active

  • I cannot restart the exam

I have already opened a support case, but the issue is not yet resolved.

I have invested a significant amount of time preparing for this certification, and I urgently need it for professional reasons. At this point, my main concern is that the active attempt status prevents me from proceeding.

Has anyone experienced a similar backend/session issue? Was SAP able to manually close the attempt for you?

I would highly appreciate any feedback or guidance.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Unable to launch certification exam
entry.content: Iam attempting for SAP signavio certification. Its not able to launch the certification and timer is still on. kindly support here in resolving this issue else my attempt would be wasted.

entry.title: SAPLearningHub / certification passed but no badge
entry.content:
Hello,
I passed my certification exam on Monday yet did not receive any badges or certification. Now I am also blocked and cant start any new certifications because apparently I have one still open... I raised a ticket straight away (5000302945), tried calling and emailing but all I am getting are AI generated responses

How can I speak with a human from SAPLearningHub support?

Best Regards,
Michal

entry.title: Unable to access my certification attempt – no response from support and no case visibility
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am writing this post out of real frustration and disappointment.

I am a SAP Learning Hub – Student Edition subscriber (valid until May 30, with two certification attempts included). My goal is simple: I want to certify. I am fully prepared, motivated, and ready to take my system-based assessment.

However, I have been blocked by a technical issue that has not been resolved for days.

This is what happened:

• I attempted to launch my certification.
• I received the message: “Another certification is currently in progress.”
• I never started another session.
• I waited, logged out, cleared cache, tried different browsers, different devices. Same error.

I opened support cases via SAP Learning Support Team:

• 5000297480
• 5000300760

Support replied inside the portal, but now I cannot even see my own cases anymore. The system shows “No cases found” under my profile.

So at this point:

– I cannot launch the exam.
– I cannot see my support cases.
– I cannot reply to support.
– My subscription continues to expire.
– My certification attempts remain blocked.

I feel completely stuck and honestly ignored.

I am not asking for special treatment.
I just want access to the certification I paid for and prepared for.

Has anyone experienced something similar with the new system-based assessments?
Is there any SAP Education contact that can help escalate identity or portal visibility issues?

I would truly appreciate guidance.

Thank you

entry.title: Is Subscription Mandatory for completing SAP certification?
entry.content: Is Subscription Mandatory for completing SAP certification? Can someone guide me with the steps for SAP certification. Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Successful certification exam for P_BTPA_2511 , but no confirmation mail or badge
entry.content:
Hi guys,

i have successfully passed the certification exam P_BTPA via the scenario-based assessments on the 30th of January. After the exam was done, i have not received any mail for confirmation or the credly badge. The only thing i can see is the badge in SAP Learning:

Did anyone have a similiar issues? I have raised a ticket in SAP Learning Self Service with the case id: 5000290165, but it takes forever, which is why i wanted to ask the community. My linked emails in my Universal ID are correct. 

Can anyone from SAP community please help me what should I do know.? Any contacts will help me as well.

Thanks in advance and best regards

Nazar

entry.title: Issue During SAP Certification Exam – Valuation Area Missing for Plant 1010
entry.content:
Today (03/03/2026), I started my SAP certification exam (C_TS452_EN_2601). While performing the assigned task, I encountered an issue related to Plant 1010, as the valuation area is missing. I verified this in table T001W.

Due to this issue, I am unable to proceed further with the examination task. I kindly request your assistance in resolving this issue at the earliest. Additionally, as this is a system-related problem, I request you to please restore my exam attempt.

entry.title: Unable to find the relevant learning journey for SAP EWM Certification (C_S4EWM)
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I would like to clarify whether the current learning journey linked to the “SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Extended Warehouse Management (C_S4EWM)” certification is correct.

As shown in the image below, the learning journey currently associated with this certification appears to correspond to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, rather than SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

Could you please confirm whether this is the intended learning journey for the certification, or if there may have been an error in the assignment?

Thank you in advance for your clarification.

entry.title: Issues in THR81 system based accessment (Successfactors Employee Central)
entry.content:
Hello,

I completed the assessment today but encountered two technical issues that prevented me from finishing certain tasks.

1. While trying to export the Country Specific Corporate Data Model, the system kept showing errors. I also tried exporting the XML file from Provisioning, but the export was unsuccessful.

2. In the Business Rule Engine, the search functionality was not working and the option to configure rules using previous values was not available. Since this is required for the task, I was unable to complete that part.

I successfully completed the remaining tasks, but the result shows a score of 50% and a failed status. I believe the technical issues may have affected the scoring and I attempted all the others so there is less to no chance for fail.

I have completed 7 out of 9 tasks successfully and those 2 becauses of these errors I was able to complete it partially only.
what to do now?

entry.title: New certification format C_S4EWM
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm currently preparing for the C_S4EWM certification exam and I have a question regarding the new exam format.

Has anyone here already taken the exam in the new format? If so, could you share your experience or any tips on how best to prepare?

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Related to exam (SAP Certified - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Financial Accounting)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have my SAP certification exam in 2 days and wanted to ask those who have recently taken the exam about the new certification exam format.

How was your experience with the new format? Are the questions mostly scenario-based, and is it manageable for beginners who have mainly practiced configuration and basic concepts?

Any last-minute preparation tips to clear the exam on the first attempt would be really helpful.

Thank you in advance!

#SAP #SAPCertification #SAPFICO #SAPLearning #SAPHANA #SAPCommunity #FinanceTransformation #SAPConsultant #S4HANA

entry.title: Unable to purchase additional Learning Hub subscriptions in SAPforMe and SAP Store
entry.content:
We are currently unable to purchase additional Learning Hub subscriptions for our consultants via SAPforMe in the Cloud Contracts area.  I have also tried going directly to the SAP Store and purchasing them (see attached screenshot), but get this error when attempting to submit the order:  The referenced contract item is outdated. Please remove the item from your cart, go back to SAP for Me and add it again. (Error Code: VAL_0028)

Per SAP Note 3318975 this is a known issue that was reported on 9 March.  I created a support request for the SAP Store back on 6 March with no response.  I've also created a support ticket via SAPforMe, but no update either.  This is the second time in a month that I've had issues with Learning Hub subscription purchasing.

Reaching out to the community to see if anyone has found a work around for this.  I have consultants waiting and need the subscription to complete Certification Exams for active customer projects.

Thanks!

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Exam Booking Availability for C_FIOAD
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,
I am interested in scheduling the C_FIOAD certification exam. However, when I attempt to book the exam, but the Exam  is not yet available for booking.

Can anybody help me with the Information, when the C_FIOAD exam will be available for scheduling? I would appreciate any information regarding the expected timeline for booking availability.
Thank you in Advacne

Kind regards,
Venkata Nagendra Reddy Vardhireddy

entry.title: Issue During SAP SuccessFactors AI Role Certification Exam – Stuck on Scoring Screen
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to report a technical issue I experienced during my SAP SuccessFactors AI Role Certification exam.

After completing all questions, I submitted my answers and proceeded to the scoring phase. However, the system became stuck on the scoring/loading screen and did not progress for an extended period of time. Despite waiting, the exam eventually ended with a “time up” status, and I was marked as failed.

I would like to clarify that I had already submitted all my responses and was in the scoring stage when this issue occurred. Therefore, this appears to be a system-related problem rather than an issue with my exam attempt.

I have already submitted a support ticket through SAP Learning, and I also have a backup file of my responses.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue, or is there any additional action I should take to ensure this is properly reviewed?

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Question About Certification Requirement for Access to EC Provisioning
entry.content:
Hi all,
I would like to ask one question regarding SAP SuccessFactors certifications.
If a person obtains the following certification, would they be eligible to access the EC implementation Provisioning environment?

SAP Certified - SAP SuccessFactors Platform: Reporting (C_THR92)

We are currently considering the priority order of certifications for our internal team members, so I would appreciate it if you could kindly confirm this when you have a chance.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: I am Unable to take the assessment test on Learninghub.
entry.content:
I am unable to purchase the LearningHub to take my Assessment Test, one of my Certification is heading close to expire (28-03-2026).
Error Code: VAL_0003
Erroe code: DCPCPS_015

am sharing the screenshots, please guide me with proper steps before it is too late.
SAP SuccessFactors Learning SAP Learning Hub Certification

entry.title: Error when taking AI-based exam - waiting for reply from support for 3 weeks
entry.content:
Hello there,
I am unable to take the new AI-based exam. After the yoodli.ai frame has loaded clicking on the "Sign in with Learning SSO" button I get the error message "Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support if the issue persists. Please try again or contact your organisation admin."

I opened a ticket with support 3 weeks ago and I am yet to receive a (non-automated) response.
Has anybody else experienced this issue? What else can I try?
To be honest I am a little bit disappointed with the support so far, I had expected more of a "Hypercare" period after rolling out this new system.
Thanks and Kind regards, C.

entry.title: CERTIFICATION EXAM ERROR
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm receiving the following error when trying to take the certification exam. My 24-hour period has started, but I can't access the exam. I urgently request your support.

entry.title: Test and certitfication of third party CMIS inplementation
entry.content:
Dear community,

we as a DMS vendor are developing a CMIS API so that our customers can archive their documents via our external CMIS Repository out of SAP S/4Hana on premise installations. Public and private cloud may follow later on.

Our questions are:

  1. Are there any tools and/or test specification provided by SAP to test our implementation for SAP S/4Hana on premise?
  2. Is there a test specification including in and output parameters provided by SAP to test our implementation for SAP S/4Hana on premise?
  3. Is it possible to certify our CMIS API for SAP S/4Hana on premise installations?

Best regards,
Michael

entry.title: SAP Certified - Implementation Consultant Asset Management (EAM)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I recently tried 1 attempt to my Exame to become a SAP Certified - Implementation Consultant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Asset Management, my score was 50% and the cut score is 70%. It was my first time trying this kind of exam and the system does not give you a feedback where you should improve or what part of the exam you was worse. I'd like to know if some of you have tried the new format exam and how was your experience? If I perform more things that the exame ask me to do, Will I be penalized?
Best regards.
